docs.title: Contributing
docs.text: Thank you for your interest in contributing to orchast_agent!

docs.title: How to Contribute
docs.text:
1. Fork the repository.
  2. Create a feature branch.
  3. Submit a Pull Request.

docs.title: Contribution Guidelines
docs.text:
• Follow the project's coding standards.
  • Ensure tests pass before submitting.
  • Provide clear descriptions of changes.

docs.title: Installation
docs.text: This page provides instructions on how to install and run orchast_agent locally.

docs.title: Setup Steps
docs.text:
1. Clone the repository: bash git clone https://github.com/user/orchast_agent.git
  2. Install dependencies: bash pip install -r requirements.txt
  3. Run the application: bash python main.py
